name: @0xkobold/pi-secret-guardian
description_en: Secret detection and pi-share-hf integration for pi-coding-agent. Scans projects, sessions, and environment for secrets, syncs to pi-share-hf workspace, and manages the collection/upload pipeline.
description_zh: pi-coding-agent的密钥检测和pi-share-hf集成。扫描项目、会话和环境中的密钥，同步到pi-share-hf工作区，并管理收集/上传管道。
